zh.lifeSummary: 當Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie於1194年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾勒 布格時，他的父親Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie45歲，母親Elisabeth d'Aubergenville30歲。他於1231年之前與Adele Luzarches結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於從1252年4月8日到1258年6月5日在法國諾門迪艾勒 貝-盧易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie于1194年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾勒 布格时，他的父亲Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie45岁，母亲Elisabeth d'Aubergenville30岁。他于1231年之前与Adele Luzarches结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于从1252年4月8日到1258年6月5日在法国諾門迪艾勒 貝-盧易。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meulan,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

nameMeanings.name: Amaury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Chantal, Christophe, Jean-Luc, Lucien, Marcel, Michel, Monique, Phillippe, Sylvanie.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Manuel, Alvaro, Antolin, Luis, Miguel, Pedro, Ramon, Roberto, Salvador.
French (mainly southern): from a regional variant of the personal name   Maurin  .
French: from a shortened form of the personal name Amaury (see Amery ).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie was born in 1194, in Le Neubourg, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie, was 45 and his mother, Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, was 30. He married Adele Luzarches before 1231. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died from 8 April 1252 to 5 June 1258, in Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie est né en 1194, à Le Neubourg, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Adele Luzarches avant 1231. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé du 8 avril 1252 au 5 juin 1258, à Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie 1194 in Le Neubourg, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie 45 und seine Mutter Elisabeth d'Aubergenville 30. Er hat vor 1231 Adele Luzarches geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb von 8. April 1252 bis 5. Juni 1258 in Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie è nato il nel 1194 nel Le Neubourg, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Adele Luzarches prima del 1231. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì da 8 aprile 1252 a 5 giugno 1258, nel Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brieが1194年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアル ネウボウルグで生まれた時，父Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brieは45歳，母Elisabeth d'Aubergenvilleは30歳であった。1231年以前にAdele Luzarchesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼はから1252年4月8日まで1258年6月5日にフランスノーマンディエウアル ベク-ヘロウインで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie(이)가 1194년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 일 니우보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth d'Aubergenville(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1231년 이전 Adele Luzarches(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1252년 4월 8일부터 1258년 6월 5일까지 프랑스 노먼디 우르 일 베c-헬루인에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie nasceu em 1194, em Le Neubourg, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Adele Luzarches antes 1231. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu de 8 de abril de 1252 a 5 de junho de 1258, em Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie родился в 1194 г. в местности л неубург, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Adele Luzarches перед 1231 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер с 8 апреля 1252 по 5 июня 1258 в местности л бек-хеллуин, эур, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie nació en 1194, en Le Neubourg, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Roger de Beaumont, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elisabeth d'Aubergenville, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Adele Luzarches antes de 1231. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió desde 8 de abril de 1252 hasta 5 de junio de 1258, en Le Bec-Hellouin, Eure, Normandie, Francia.
